reasoning: We estimate whether November daily mean temperatures in Poitiers, France will surpass the notably cool October 26 baseline of 9.25 °C. Using Poitiers climatology, the expected daily mean for early November is ~10.5 °C, while the late November expected mean drops considerably to ~7 °C. Incorporating normal weather variations and standard deviations of ~3.5-4 °C, the likelihood of a daily mean exceeding 9.25 °C for November 2 is better than even (estimated at 64%). For November 25, the baseline climatology is much lower, meaning an above-average warm day is required to exceed 9.25 °C (estimated at 38%). As mandated, uncertainty appropriately scales such that the later date's forecast is closer to 0.5.
